creator: Black_N@ukr.net
text:
(In reply to hbsd from comment #8)
I got the same problem after updating mpv (FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE-p7):

mpv: 0.38.0_1,1 -> 0.39.0,1

But I use the xf86-video-nv driver (my hardware is old), so for me I use the following:

$ mpv --vo=x11 video.mp4

This works for me... I understand this may not be the solution for you.
